_comment: Scene-anchored narration for the HarnessStory composition. anchor maps to a scene in HarnessStory.tsx; audio plays during that scene. Timed roughly to scene durations at 30fps.

sections.text: Every independent bakery throws out nearly forty percent of what it bakes. The waste isn't ignorance. It's uncertainty.
BakerySense closes the loop. Every night it replays its own decisions, diagnoses where the forecast missed, proposes a fix, and validates it, before a human ever sees it.
This is the live product. Corrections it learned from the bakery's own sales, waiting for review.
At Bukit Bintang, croissants ran twenty-five percent high every Wednesday. The harness caught it, and a held-out test confirms the fix cuts error from three percent to two.
Same brand, same model. But each shop evolves its own playbook. Bukit Bintang learned Wednesdays. Subang learned Sundays.
The harness proposes. The owner decides. Every edit is validated, and every edit is auditable.
The model stays frozen. The skills evolve. BakerySense. A self-evolving harness for perishable businesses.
